view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a detection source is satisfied as evidenced by the breach record.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a detection source is satisfied as evidenced by the breach record.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a detection source in the saga's context. The evidence provided includes a breach record that explicitly states the detection source as 'auto_engine', which directly fulfills the requirement of having a detection source such as 'auto_engine' or 'manual_review'. This clear identification of the detection source confirms that the requirement is met without any gaps.
